Package Index | Class Index

public class

BinaryXmlPullParser

extends Object
implements TypedXmlPullParser
java.lang.Object
   ↳ com.android.modules.utils.BinaryXmlPullParser
Known Direct Subclasses
ArtBinaryXmlPullParser
ArtBinaryXmlPullParser

This decodes large code-points using 4-byte sequences, and is not compatible with the DataInput API contract, which specifies that large code-points must be encoded with 3-byte sequences. 

Class Overview

Parser that reads XML documents using a custom binary wire protocol which benchmarking has shown to be 8.5x faster than ERROR(/Xml.newFastPullParser()) for a typical packages.xml.

The high-level design of the wire protocol is to directly serialize the event stream, while efficiently and compactly writing strongly-typed primitives delivered through the TypedXmlSerializer interface.

Each serialized event is a single byte where the lower half is a normal XmlPullParser token and the upper half is an optional data type signal, such as ERROR(/#TYPE_INT).

This parser has some specific limitations:

  • Only the UTF-8 encoding is supported.
  • Variable length values, such as byte[] or String, are limited to 65,535 bytes in length. Note that String values are stored as UTF-8 on the wire.
  • Namespaces, prefixes, properties, and options are unsupported.

Summary
